مسیریابی و ناوبری درایور را در برنامه خود ادغام کنید.

 ![](https://developers.google.com/_static/images/translated.svg?hl=fa) این صفحه به‌وسیله [‏Cloud Translation API‏](https://cloud.google.com/translate/?hl=fa)
 ترجمه شده است.

*   [صفحه اصلی](https://developers.google.com/?hl=fa)
    
*   [محصولات](https://developers.google.com/products?hl=fa)
    
*   [Google Maps Platform](https://developers.google.com/maps?hl=fa)
    
*   [Mobility Services](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/mobility?hl=fa)
    
*   [Driver experience](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/mobility/driver-sdk?hl=fa)
    

با مجموعه‌ها، منظم بمانید ذخیره و طبقه‌بندی محتوا براساس اولویت‌های شما.

[![](https://developers.google.com/static/maps/documentation/mobility/includes/driversdk-landing/nav-sdk-header_1440_2880.png?hl=fa)](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/mobility/driver-sdk/navigation?hl=fa)

### [Navigation SDK](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/mobility/driver-sdk/navigation?hl=fa)

از Navigation SDK برای ایجاد یک تجربه ناوبری گام به گام در برنامه خود برای راهنمایی رانندگان در زمان واقعی استفاده کنید.

[نمای کلی](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/mobility/driver-sdk/navigation?hl=fa)

[![](https://developers.google.com/static/maps/documentation/mobility/includes/driversdk-landing/DriverRouteDevice_2880.png?hl=fa)](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/mobility/driver-sdk/on-demand?hl=fa)

### [درایور SDK](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/mobility/driver-sdk/on-demand?hl=fa)

از Driver SDK استفاده کنید تا مکان های راننده و پیشرفت مسیر خود را فعال کنید تا از طریق Fleet Engine تجسم شود.

[سفرهای درخواستی، سفرهای درخواستی](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/mobility/driver-sdk/on-demand?hl=fa)
 [وظایف برنامه ریزی شده، وظایف برنامه ریزی شده](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/mobility/driver-sdk/scheduled?hl=fa)

![](https://developers.google.com/static/maps/images/landing/maps-get-started_2880.png?hl=fa)

### نحوه ادغام تجربه Driver

این مراحل گردش کار سطح بالا را برای ادغام تجربه Driver در برنامه درایور شما پوشش می دهد تا با Fleet Engine کار کند.

*   [directions](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/mobility/driver-sdk/navigation?hl=fa)
    
    #### [Navigation SDK را در برنامه خود ادغام کنید](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/mobility/driver-sdk/navigation?hl=fa)
    
    Navigation SDK کتابخانه ای است که مسئول ارائه قابلیت های ناوبری سفارشی شده برای رانندگان شماست، مانند دستورالعمل های گام به گام، مسیرهای سفارشی شده و عناصر نقشه سفارشی شده.
    
*   [local\_shipping](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/mobility/driver-sdk/on-demand?hl=fa)
    
    #### [Driver SDK را تنظیم کنید](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/mobility/driver-sdk/on-demand?hl=fa)
    
    Driver SDK سیگنال‌های موقعیت مکانی بی‌درنگ را به Fleet Engine می‌فرستد، که بخشی ضروری از فعال کردن قابلیت‌های مکان و مسیریابی در Fleet Engine است. Driver SDK پوششی برای Navigation SDK است.
    
*   [table](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/mobility/fleet-engine?hl=fa)
    
    #### [سفرها را از طریق Fleet Engine مدیریت کنید](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/mobility/fleet-engine?hl=fa)
    
    Fleet Engine تعامل بین Driver SDK و سرویس Backend خودتان را مدیریت می کند. سرویس پشتیبان شما می تواند با برقراری تماس REST یا gRPC با Fleet Engine ارتباط برقرار کند.

 para traducir esta página.

Descripción general Organiza tus páginas con colecciones Guarda y categoriza el contenido según tus preferencias.
=================================================================================================================

Los anunciantes que usan [extensiones de formulario de clientes potenciales](https://support.google.com/google-ads/answer/9423234?hl=es-419)
 pueden aprovechar la solución de webhook para recibir clientes potenciales directamente en su solución de CRM preferida.

![](https://developers.google.com/static/google-ads/webhook/images/how-it-works.png?hl=es-419)

La solución de CRM de webhook te permite configurar una ruta de URL, que luego usamos para enviar todos los datos de clientes potenciales entrantes desde el anuncio. Junto con la URL, proporcionas una clave que puede usarse para validar los clientes potenciales enviados.

Después de que el usuario hace clic en un anuncio y envía el formulario de clientes potenciales, se envía una solicitud HTTP POST a la URL configurada. Los datos del cliente potencial van directamente al CRM que elijas.

Recursos
--------

*   [Guía de implementación](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/webhook/docs/implementation?hl=es-419)
    
*   [Configura una integración de webhook para una extensión de formulario de clientes potenciales](https://support.google.com/google-ads/answer/10089407?hl=es-419)

. Java es una marca registrada de Oracle o sus afiliados.

Enviar comentarios Organiza tus páginas con colecciones Guarda y categoriza el contenido según tus preferencias.

![](https://developers.google.com/static/profile/images/hero.svg?hl=es-419)

### Enriquece tu recorrido de desarrollador

El programa de Google Developers hace que la documentación sea más útil, que la capacitación sea más accesible y que tus logros sean más visibles.

[Explorar el programa](https://developers.google.com/profile/u/me/dashboard?hl=es-419)
 [Ver las Preguntas frecuentes](https://developers.google.com/profile/help/faq?hl=es-419)

![](https://developers.google.com/static/profile/images/gemini.svg?hl=es-419)

### Resolver problemas con Gemini

Obtén respuestas a tus preguntas sobre programación, resúmenes rápidos de documentación y resultados de la búsqueda relevantes en el sitio con herramientas potenciadas por IA que usan los modelos de Gemini.

![](https://developers.google.com/static/profile/images/grow.svg?hl=es-419)

### Aprende y comparte tu éxito

Adapta tu recorrido de aprendizaje a tus intereses a medida que domines Android, Google Cloud, Firebase, Chrome y mucho más. Organiza tu trabajo, haz un seguimiento de tu progreso, gana insignias y comparte tus logros.

![](https://developers.google.com/static/profile/images/premium-tier.svg?hl=es-419)

### Aprovecha al máximo el nivel premium

El [nivel premium del programa de Google Developer](https://developers.google.com/profile/u/me/plans-and-pricing?hl=es-419)
 proporciona acceso a recursos y oportunidades exclusivos para ayudarte a aprender, crear y crecer con Google.

![](https://developers.google.com/static/profile/images/code-explain_2880.png?hl=es-419)

Beta

### Encuentra respuestas y descubre contenido relevante

Como miembro del programa, obtienes acceso a herramientas que usan modelos de Gemini para ayudarte a mantenerte organizado, obtener respuestas a tus preguntas técnicas y acelerar tus proyectos.

_Estas funciones solo están disponibles en [regiones compatibles](https://developers.google.com/profile/available-regions?hl=es-419)
._

*   chat
    
    #### Chat
    
    Una interfaz de chat con modelos de Gemini. Se encuentra junto a la documentación de Google for Developers, en la que encontrarás respuestas a tus preguntas en tiempo real.
    
*   code
    
    #### Explicación del código
    
    Es una herramienta disponible en cada bloque de código en la documentación de Google for Developers que proporciona explicaciones detalladas del código. Puedes profundizar haciendo preguntas de seguimiento.
    
*   summarize
    
    #### Buscar resúmenes
    
    Son resultados de la búsqueda que resumen la información y ofrecen respuestas más detalladas y detalladas directamente en la página de resultados de búsqueda.
    

[Consulta nuestras Preguntas frecuentes](https://developers.google.com/profile/help/faq?hl=es-419#ai-features)

[![](https://developers.google.com/static/profile/images/badges_2880.png?hl=es-419)](https://developers.google.com/profile/help/badges?hl=es-419)

### [Demuestra tu experiencia](https://developers.google.com/profile/help/badges?hl=es-419)

Mejora tu recorrido de desarrollador con insignias que reconocen tus logros y fomentan tu progreso en Android, Google Cloud, Firebase, Chrome y mucho más.

[Más información sobre las insignias](https://developers.google.com/profile/help/badges?hl=es-419)

[![](https://developers.google.com/static/profile/images/join-community_2880.png?hl=es-419)](https://developers.google.com/profile/help/communities-programs?hl=es-419)

### [Haz crecer tu comunidad de desarrolladores](https://developers.google.com/profile/help/communities-programs?hl=es-419)

Únete a grupos como Google Cloud Innovators y Google Maps Platform Innovators. Comparte recursos, establece conexiones y crea un perfil público para compartirlo con otras personas.

[Ver las comunidades y los programas](https://developers.google.com/profile/u/me/my-community?hl=es-419)
 [Más información sobre las comunidades y los programas](https://developers.google.com/profile/help/communities-programs?hl=es-419)

[![](https://developers.google.com/static/profile/images/interests_2880.png?hl=es-419)](https://developers.google.com/profile/u/me/settings?hl=es-419#interests)

### [Explora nuevas vías de aprendizaje](https://developers.google.com/profile/u/me/settings?hl=es-419#interests)

Selecciona intereses en lenguajes de programación, productos y categorías para personalizar tu experiencia de desarrollador. Recibe recomendaciones de contenido personalizadas en función de tus selecciones, tu actividad de navegación y los intereses que guardaste anteriormente.

[Selecciona tus intereses](https://developers.google.com/profile/u/me/settings?hl=es-419#interests)
 [Más información sobre los intereses](https://developers.google.com/profile/help/interests?hl=es-419)

[![](https://developers.google.com/static/profile/images/saved-pages_2880.png?hl=es-419)](https://developers.google.com/profile/help/saved-pages?hl=es-419)

### [Cómo agregar tus páginas favoritas a Favoritos](https://developers.google.com/profile/help/saved-pages?hl=es-419)

Agrega tus páginas favoritas a favoritos y recibe notificaciones cuando se actualice el contenido guardado. Organiza las páginas guardadas en colecciones personalizadas para administrar el contenido más importante para ti.

[Más información sobre las páginas guardadas](https://developers.google.com/profile/help/saved-pages?hl=es-419)
 [Más información sobre las colecciones](https://developers.google.com/profile/help/collections?hl=es-419)

Stay organized with collections Save and categorize content based on your preferences.

DevFest
=======

The world's largest community-driven tech conference, hosted by Google Developer Groups, where developers connect, learn and build the future with cutting-edge technologies.

### Frequently Asked Questions

### FAQs

### What is DevFest?

DevFest is a global, community-led tech conference series hosted by Google Developer Groups (GDGs). Each DevFest event is crafted by its local organizers to fit the needs and interests of the local developer community. Think of it as an annual celebration of technology and community, happening in cities all over the world.

### What are Google Developer Groups (GDG)?

[Google Developer Groups](https://developers.google.com/community/gdg)
 (GDG) are local, community-run meetups for developers interested in Google's technologies. With over 1,000 chapters in 140+ countries, they form the largest developer community network in the world.

The goal of a GDG is to help developers:

*   **Learn:** Get hands-on experience with new technologies through workshops, talks, and events.
*   **Connect:** Network with other developers and build a strong professional community in your city.
*   **Grow:** Share your expertise, build leadership skills, and advance your career in a supportive environment.

### When will DevFest 2025 events happen?

DevFest season in 2025 will take place globally from **October 1 to December 31, 2025**. [Find a DevFest](https://developers.google.com/community/devfest#find-a-devfest-community-near-you)
 near you!

### How can I become a member of Google Developer Group?

Joining your local GDG is simple and free!

Here’s how to get started:

1.  **Find a chapter:** Visit the [GDG Community Platform](https://gdg.community.dev/)
     and use the map or search bar to find a GDG chapter in your area.
2.  **Join the Group:** Click on the chapter's page and look for a "Join" or "Join Us" button. This will add you to their member list and ensure you get notified about upcoming events.

**Interested in leading a community?**

If you have a passion for community building, you can also apply to become a GDG organizer and lead a chapter in your area. You can learn more about the application process on the [Google for Developers site](https://developers.google.com/community)
.

### What is unique about DevFest?

DevFest is an annual conference hosted by Google Developer Group communities around the world. Unlike a typical meetup or speaker session, these events are larger and include a variety of activities to help developers learn about and build with Google's developer tools.

Throughout the second half of the year, DevFest events bring local developers together to learn about new products and updates directly from Google product teams.

### What technologies might I discover at a DevFest?

At a DevFest, you'll explore a variety of Google's developer technologies. While this year's theme focuses on **Building Safe, Secure, and Scalable Solutions with AI and Cloud**, you can also expect to find sessions and workshops on other technologies such as: Android development; Flutter for cross-platform app development; Firebase; Machine Learning and TensorFlow; Web development.

Find a [DevFest event](https://developers.google.com/community/devfest#find-a-devfest-community-near-you)
 near you and learn more about other products [here](https://developers.google.com/products)
.

### How do I request to speak at a DevFest?

Contact a GDG chapter near you to see speaking opportunities.

### Will events be virtual or in person?

DevFest events can be in person, online, or hybrid. Find the DevFest events for your region using the [map tool](https://developers.google.com/community/devfest#find-a-devfest-community-near-you)
. It is up to a GDG to decide what is best for their community.

### How can I stay informed?

Seek out your local [Google Developer Group](https://developers.google.com/community/gdg)
. To stay updated, search the Google Developer Group page, follow Google Developer Groups on [X](https://x.com/googledevgroups)
, or visit the [Google for Developers blog](https://developers.googleblog.com/en/)
 .

### Do I need to register to view the sessions?

Most DevFest events do require an RSVP. Find DevFest events in your region using the [map feature on the home page](https://developers.google.com/community/devfest#find-a-devfest-community-near-you)
.

### If the event is online and available to everyone, why do I need to request an invite or register?

Registration and attendance numbers help us plan better events. Please RSVP for each event that interests you, and keep in mind that attendance may be limited, especially for in-person events.

### Will the sessions be in my language?

DevFest is a distributed global conference featuring events in countries around the world. DevFest sessions will usually be hosted in the regional language, unless otherwise specified.

[Find an event](https://developers.google.com/community/devfest#find-a-devfest-community-near-you)
 near you.

### Does Google run its own DevFest events?

No. However, Googlers will attend and speak at DevFest events across the world.

### Will DevFests also cover non-AI topics?

Absolutely! DevFest conference agendas are customized to match the local developer community's interests. They feature talks, hands-on demos, workshops, and codelabs on the latest Google technologies, covering areas like Android, Firebase, Google Cloud, and AI/ML. While the AI theme guides the agenda, it doesn't prevent the exploration of other pertinent topics.
